overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City at night. The scene features wet neon-lit streets, atmospheric fog, and futuristic architecture with prominent digital billboards as the character navigates sidewalks, crosses intersections, and passes under an elevated highway.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city sidewalk with metal railings and digital billboards

events.description: white sedan drives past on the right side of the wet street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the orange-tiled sidewalk, passing pedestrians and observing the neon-lit street

notable_agents.action: person in yellow jacket and white mask walking toward the camera
white car with headlights on driving down the multi-lane street

entered.detail: tall dark skyscraper with illuminated '03' sign near the top, dominating the skyline
green metal barrier separating the pedestrian walkway from the street drop-off
tall structure with multiple glowing advertisement screens showing animated content
tall pole with bright white light illuminating the foggy atmosphere

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wide, wet sidewalk bordered by a green metal railing on the right. The street is lined with tall futuristic buildings featuring prominent neon advertisements. A pedestrian in a yellow jacket approaches from the left while cars occasionally pass on the right. The atmosphere is foggy with a prominent '03' building visible in the distance.

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk past palm trees, approaching a crosswalk intersection

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing walking ahead in the same direction on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall illuminated palm trees lining the left side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking as the scene reveals tall palm trees on the left side of the walkway. The '03' building grows larger in the center view while the metal railing recedes into the distance on the right. The street remains relatively quiet with sparse pedestrian traffic and occasional vehicles. The wet pavement reflects the neon lights from surrounding advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with zebra crossing and neon storefronts

events.description: character steps onto the yellow-striped crosswalk to cross the multi-lane street
character turns right at the street corner, moving away from the main intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection via the crosswalk, then turning right at the corner

notable_agents.action: woman in white top and green pants waiting at the corner to cross
black SUV driving through the intersection

entered.detail: broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing marking the intersection
high-rise structure covered in large digital screens displaying advertisements
circular glowing pink neon sign depicting a ramen bowl with chopsticks

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the wide intersection using the yellow-striped crosswalk, navigating between passing vehicles including a black SUV. A woman waits at the corner near a glowing pink neon ramen sign. After crossing, the character turns right, moving away from the main '03' building which now appears in the left distance, toward a narrower street with an overpass ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow street beneath elevated highway overpass

events.description: character walks under the elevated highway overpass into a more enclosed urban canyon

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass through a narrower corridor with buildings on both sides

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing walking ahead under the overpass

entered.detail: massive concrete highway structure overhead with support columns lining the street
tight urban facades with neon signs and graffiti covering the walls

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrower street beneath a massive elevated highway overpass, creating an urban canyon effect. The lighting becomes darker and more mixed as the sky is blocked by the concrete structure above. Neon signs and graffiti adorn the building walls on both sides. The character continues walking deeper under the overpass, following another pedestrian into the enclosed corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit urban district that transitions from wide, open sidewalks into a claustrophobic concrete underpass. It begins with the character walking along a wet pavement bordered by a green metal railing, passing futuristic buildings and a pedestrian in a yellow jacket under a foggy sky. As the camera advances, the view opens up to reveal tall palm trees and a prominent building marked 03, while the wet ground increasingly reflects the vibrant glow of surrounding advertisements. The scene then shifts as the character navigates a yellow-striped crosswalk through passing traffic and past a pink neon ramen sign, before turning right and moving away from the main skyline. Finally, the environment narrows and darkens as the camera follows the character beneath a massive elevated highway overpass, entering an urban canyon of graffiti and neon signs.
